category: 1_a (Intended Purpose, Provider and Version of the System)
extraction_target: The specific purpose for which the AI system is intended to be used
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the specific problem the AI system solves and its exact intended use case.

category: 1_a (Intended Purpose, Provider and Version of the System)
extraction_target: The name of the company/entity that developed the system or places it on the market under its own name
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide the legal name of the company or entity providing the AI system.

category: 1_a (Intended Purpose, Provider and Version of the System)
extraction_target: The current version information of the AI system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to specify the current version number or identifier of the AI system.

category: 1_a (Intended Purpose, Provider and Version of the System)
extraction_target: The relation of the current version to previous versions, modifications made, or differences
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to summarize the main differences or modifications from previous versions of the system, or state if it is the first version.

extraction_target: How the system interacts with external hardware that is not part of the system itself
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain if and how the AI system interacts with external hardware like sensors or cameras.

extraction_target: How the system interacts with external software
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe any integrations with external software (e.g., ERP, CRM) and how data flows between them.

extraction_target: Where applicable, the system's interaction with other AI systems
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail any interactions or dependencies with other AI systems or third-party models.

entity_name: Versions of relevant software or firmware
extraction_target: The versions of software or firmware relevant to the operation of the system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to list the relevant software or firmware versions required for the system's operation.

extraction_target: Requirements and procedures related to version updates
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain their version control policy and the criteria for future updates.

entity_name: Forms of placing on the market or putting into service
extraction_target: The form in which the system is placed on the market; e.g., whether it is an API, a downloadable file, or software embedded into hardware
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to clarify how the system is delivered to customers (e.g., as an API, SaaS, downloadable software, or embedded in hardware).

entity_name: Hardware intended to run the AI system
extraction_target: Description of the hardware on which the AI system is intended/required to run
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to specify the hardware or cloud infrastructure required to run the AI system (e.g., local servers, AWS, edge devices).

category: 1_f (Physical Features of AI Systems that are Product Components)
entity_name: Photographs or illustrations of external features
extraction_target: Photographs or illustrations showing the external features of the products
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to upload photos or illustrations of the product's external features, or mark as N/A if it is a software-only product.

category: 1_f (Physical Features of AI Systems that are Product Components)
extraction_target: The markings and labels on the products
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe or upload the physical markings and labels on the product, or mark as N/A if not applicable.

category: 1_f (Physical Features of AI Systems that are Product Components)
extraction_target: The internal layout of the products
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide technical drawings or descriptions of the product's internal layout, or mark as N/A if not applicable.

entity_name: Basic description of the deployer user-interface
extraction_target: A basic description of the user-interface provided to the person/entity [deployer] using the system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the user interface, dashboard, or control panel provided to the deployer, or upload UI mockups.

entity_name: Instructions for use for the deployer
extraction_target: Instructions for use prepared for the person/entity [deployer] operating the system under their own authority
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to upload the 'Instructions for Use' or user manual provided to the deployers/customers.

entity_name: Basic description of the user-interface (where applicable)
extraction_target: Description of the deployer user-interface where applicable - a requirement parallel to 1_g_1
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to ensure a basic description of the user interface is included within their instructions for use.

extraction_target: The methods and steps followed for the development of the AI system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the overall lifecycle, methodologies, and specific steps followed during the development of the AI system.

entity_name: Use of third-party pre-trained systems or tools
extraction_target: Where relevant, the use of pre-trained systems or tools provided by third parties
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to list any pre-trained models, external APIs, or third-party tools used in building the system, or mark as N/A if built entirely from scratch.

entity_name: Integration or modification of third-party tools
extraction_target: How the third-party tools used were integrated or modified by the provider
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain how they integrated, fine-tuned, or modified the third-party tools and pre-trained models mentioned, or mark as N/A.

extraction_target: The general logic of the AI system and its algorithms
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain the core algorithms and the general logic behind how the AI system processes inputs to generate outputs.

entity_name: Key design choices, rationale and assumptions
extraction_target: The key design choices made, the rationale for these choices, and the assumptions they are based on
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail their key architectural design choices, the reasons for these choices, and any underlying assumptions made during development.

extraction_target: Target audience assumptions regarding the persons or groups of persons on whom the system is intended to be used
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to specify the target demographic or specific groups of people the AI system is intended to be used on.

extraction_target: The main classification choices made by the system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the main classification categories or sorting choices the AI system is designed to make.

extraction_target: What the system is designed to optimize for
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to define what specific outcomes, functions, or metrics the AI system is designed to optimize (e.g., speed, accuracy, cost reduction).

extraction_target: The purpose and relevance of the different parameters to each other
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain the purpose and relevance of the key parameters used in the model to achieve its goals.

extraction_target: Description of the expected output from the system and the quality of this output
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the expected output format and the anticipated quality or accuracy of these outputs.

extraction_target: Decisions about any possible trade-offs made regarding the technical solutions adopted to comply with the mandatory requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain any trade-offs made between technical performance (e.g., speed, accuracy) and compliance requirements (e.g., fairness, robustness, non-discrimination).

extraction_target: The system architecture explaining how software components build on or feed into each other and integrate into the overall processing
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide a system architecture description or diagram showing how the software components interact and process data.

extraction_target: The computational resources used to develop, train, test, and validate the AI system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail the computational resources (e.g., GPU hours, cloud infrastructure, hardware types) used to develop, train, and test the AI system.

extraction_target: Datasheets describing the training methodologies and techniques
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to upload datasheets or describe the specific methodologies and techniques used to train the AI model.

entity_name: General description of training data sets
extraction_target: A general description, scope, and main characteristics of the training data sets used
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide a general description, the scope, and the main characteristics of the datasets used for training.

extraction_target: The provenance of the training data and where it was obtained from
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to state the exact provenance of the training data and explicitly list the sources from which the data was obtained.

extraction_target: How the data was obtained and selected
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain the process and criteria used for acquiring, filtering, and selecting the training data.

extraction_target: Data labelling procedures for situations such as supervised learning
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the data labelling procedures and protocols used, or mark as N/A if no labelling was involved.

extraction_target: Data cleaning methodologies, e.g., outliers detection
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail the data cleaning methodologies applied, such as outlier detection and handling of missing values.

extraction_target: Assessment of the human oversight measures needed in accordance with Article 14
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the 'human-in-the-loop' or human oversight measures implemented to monitor the system's operation and intervene if necessary.

extraction_target: Assessment of the technical measures needed to facilitate the interpretation of the outputs by the deployers, in accordance with Article 13(3)
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain the technical measures provided to help deployers interpret, understand, and trust the AI system's outputs.

entity_name: Pre-determined changes to the AI system
extraction_target: Where applicable, a detailed description of pre-determined changes to the AI system and its performance
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe any pre-planned updates or continuous learning mechanisms allowed for the AI system post-deployment, or mark as N/A if the model is static.

extraction_target: Information related to the technical solutions adopted to ensure the continuous compliance of the AI system with the relevant requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail the technical solutions adopted to ensure the AI system remains legally compliant and safe over time, especially after any pre-determined changes.

extraction_target: The validation and testing procedures used
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the validation and testing procedures used during the AI system's development.

extraction_target: Information about the validation and testing data used and their main characteristics
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide information and the main characteristics of the data sets used for validation and testing.

entity_name: Metrics for accuracy, robustness and compliance
extraction_target: Metrics used to measure accuracy, robustness, and compliance with other relevant requirements
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to specify the exact metrics used to measure the system's accuracy, robustness, and overall compliance.

extraction_target: Metrics/methods used to measure potentially discriminatory impacts
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain the metrics or methods used to measure, evaluate, and mitigate potentially discriminatory impacts or biases.

extraction_target: Test logs and all test reports dated and signed by the responsible persons, including with regard to pre-determined changes
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to upload the test logs and the formal test reports dated and signed by the responsible persons.

extraction_target: Cybersecurity measures put in place
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail the cybersecurity measures implemented to protect the AI system against unauthorized access, attacks, or data poisoning.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
extraction_target: The capabilities and limitations in the performance of the system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to clearly describe both the capabilities and the known technical limitations in the performance of the AI system.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
entity_name: Degrees of accuracy for specific target persons/groups
extraction_target: Degrees of accuracy for specific persons or groups of persons on which the system is intended to be used
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to state the evaluated degrees of accuracy specifically for the demographic groups or target persons the system will be used on.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
extraction_target: The overall expected level of accuracy in relation to its intended purpose
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide the overall expected level of accuracy of the AI system considering its specific intended purpose.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
extraction_target: Foreseeable unintended outcomes
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to list any foreseeable unintended outcomes or side effects that may occur during the system's operation.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
entity_name: Sources of risks to health, safety, fundamental rights and discrimination
extraction_target: Sources of risks to health, safety, fundamental rights, and discrimination in view of the intended purpose
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to identify the potential sources of risks to health, safety, fundamental rights, and discrimination arising from the system's intended use.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
extraction_target: The human oversight measures needed in accordance with Article 14
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the human oversight guidelines and procedures required for deployers to safely monitor and intervene with the AI system.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
entity_name: Technical measures for output interpretation by deployers
extraction_target: Technical measures put in place to facilitate the interpretation of the outputs by the deployers
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain the technical features or interface elements put in place to help deployers easily and accurately interpret the system's outputs.

category: 3 (Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system)
extraction_target: Specifications on input data, where applicable
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to define the exact specifications, quality requirements, and formats needed for the input data to ensure the system functions properly, or mark as N/A.

category: 4 (A description of the appropriateness of the performance metrics for the specific AI system)
extraction_target: Explanation of why the selected performance metrics are appropriate for the specific AI system
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to explain why the chosen performance metrics are appropriate, relevant, and sufficient for measuring this specific AI system's intended purpose.

category: 5 (A detailed description of the risk management system in accordance with Article 9)
extraction_target: Detailed description of the risk management system established in accordance with Article 9
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to provide a detailed description of their risk management system, explaining how they continuously identify, evaluate, and mitigate risks to health, safety, and fundamental rights.

category: 6 (A description of relevant changes made by the provider to the system through its lifecycle)
extraction_target: Description of relevant changes made by the provider to the AI ​​system throughout its lifecycle
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe any relevant updates, modifications, or changes made to the AI system throughout its lifecycle, or mark as N/A if it is the first release.

extraction_target: List of harmonized standards published in the Official Journal of the European Union and fully or partially implemented
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to list any EU harmonised standards applied to the system, or mark as N/A if none were used.

entity_name: Detailed description of adopted solutions (where no harmonised standards applied)
extraction_target: Detailed description of alternative solutions adopted to meet the requirements in Section III Part 2, where no harmonized standards were applied
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to detail the alternative technical solutions adopted to meet the mandatory safety and compliance requirements since no EU harmonised standards were applied.

entity_name: List of other relevant standards and technical specifications applied
extraction_target: List of other relevant standards and technical specifications applied, where no harmonized standards were applied
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to list any other industry standards, frameworks, or technical specifications they applied in the absence of EU harmonised standards.

category: 8 (A copy of the EU declaration of conformity referred to in Article 47)
extraction_target: A copy of the EU declaration of conformity referred to in Article 47
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to upload a copy of the formally signed EU declaration of conformity, or state if it has not yet been drawn up.

extraction_target: Detailed description of the system established to evaluate the performance of the artificial intelligence system after it is placed on the market [post-market phase], in accordance with Article 72
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to describe the post-market monitoring system established to actively and systematically collect data on the AI system's performance once it is live on the market.

extraction_target: Post-market monitoring plan specified in Article 72(3)
fallback_prompt: Ask the user to upload or provide the specific post-market monitoring plan that details how post-market evaluation is systematically planned and executed.
